same input,same output.You analyse-plan~execute,and a single principal can cer Complex: adaptive agents that respond to one another -a cat, a flock, a market. Beha emergent,loops back on itself （the feedback arrows).and a new order fors （the dash cluster) that you can't read off any part.You probe ~sense →respond.The factory Complicated: passive parts in fixed 1inkage -a clock.Knowable,decomposable,predic correct for the left-hand world;adaptive engineoring is only for the right-hand one.
tajivchandegra.com jiv Chandegra
